banner.noProtein: Load a structure to begin the workflow pipeline.

hints.noSelection: Load coordinates (file / RCSB / UniProt) or paste FASTA in Input — pipeline stages unlock after a target exists.
hints.resolving: Structure resolving — when the model lands, Analysis and Visualization unlock. Use Source for remote fetch or AFDB.
hints.predicted: Predicted model loaded — review confidence in Inspector, isolate chains, then run interaction analysis when the worker is attached.
hints.experimental: Experimental structure — inspect assemblies & polymer context; Simulation / Engineering remain offline until backends are wired.

orchestration.unreachable: Stages: viewer-derived. Job API unreachable — overlay disabled.
orchestration.disconnected: Stages: viewer-derived only. Job queue not connected.
orchestration.connectedEmpty: Stages: viewer-derived; job API connected (queue empty).
